title: viola canina subsp. jordanii
intro: Viola canina subsp. jordanii, also known as the dog violet, is a flowering plant species in the family Violaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Viola canina subsp. jordanii include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, or taken internally to promote overall well-being.
